models.notes: CLIP ViT-B/32. Uses DINOv2Engine image side (vision_model path).
CLIP ViT-L/14. Higher quality embeddings than B/32.

models.display_name: Co Dino Inst Vit L Coco
models.notes: Requires OpenMMLab + mmdet + manual checkpoint download. Expert use. Not beginner-friendly.

models.display_name: Co Dino Inst Vit L Lvis
models.notes: Requires OpenMMLab + mmdet + manual checkpoint download. Expert use.
ConvNeXtV2-Base. Good balance of accuracy and inference cost.
ConvNeXtV2-Large.
ConvNeXtV2-Tiny. Fastest ConvNeXtV2 variant. ImageNet-22k pretrained.
DEIM Medium. Not yet wired.
DEIM (Detection with Enriched Information Module). Claimed strong COCO AP. Requires custom integration. Not yet wired.
DEIMv2 Medium. Not yet wired.
DEIMv2 (improved DEIM architecture). Claimed competitive COCO mAP. No HF path confirmed. Not yet wired.
Alias for dfine-l-o365-coco. Requires GPU.
COCO-only L variant. Repo ustc-community/dfine-large-coco — verify availability before use. Use dfine-l-o365-coco for Objects365+COCO training.
Objects365+COCO pretrained, 25-epoch fine-tune. Requires GPU.
Alias for dfine-m-o365-coco. Objects365+COCO training.
COCO-only trained M variant. Repo ustc-community/dfine-medium-coco — verify availability before use. For guaranteed availability use dfine-m-o365-coco.
Objects365+COCO pretrained. Stronger than dfine-s-o365-coco; use when 4 GB+ VRAM available.
Alias for dfine-s-o365-coco. Objects365+COCO training gives stronger accuracy than COCO-only.
COCO-only trained S variant. Repo ustc-community/dfine-small-coco — verify availability before use. For guaranteed availability use dfine-s-o365-coco (Objects365+COCO).
Objects365+COCO pretrained. Verified inference via HF Transformers (ustc-community checkpoint). First D-FINE variant recommended for competitiveness benchmarks.
Alias for dfine-x-o365-coco. Highest accuracy in D-FINE family. Requires 12+ GB VRAM.
COCO-only XL variant. Repo ustc-community/dfine-xlarge-coco — verify availability before use. Use dfine-x-o365-coco for Objects365+COCO training.
Largest D-FINE with Objects365+COCO training. Requires 12+ GB VRAM. Highest AP in D-FINE family.
1536-d embedding. Highest quality. Use --isolate-process for safety.
DO NOT use for detection AP. 384-d L2-normalized embedding.
Runnable via Florence2Engine (engines/florence2.py). Pass task= to select prompt token; phrase_grounding accepts a free-form prompt string.
Same engine as florence-2-base. Heavier weights — keep auto_download=false to avoid silent pulls.
Composes Grounding DINO Tiny + SAM ViT-Base for text-prompted mask generation. Not claimed as a benchmark winner.
Capability-matched to prompt-based universal segmentation. Not advertised as a benchmark winner.
API-gated by IDEA-Research. Weights not openly downloadable. Requires upstream API token. VisionServeX does not call external APIs without admin-configured token.
Grounding DINO base (Swin-B backbone). Stronger accuracy than Tiny for open-vocabulary detection.
MaskDINO unifies detection and segmentation. Requires detectron2 environment. Not yet wired — waiting for HF or pip-installable path.
Panoptic variant of MaskDINO. Expert use only. Not yet wired.
MaxViT tiny variant.
Returns deterministic, image-derived fake detections. Use as a smoke test before downloading any real model.
Runnable via OWLv2Engine (engines/owlv2.py). Returns OpenVocabularyResult with one detection per matched text query.
Same engine as owlv2-base-patch16; heavier. Keep auto_download=false.
OWL-ViT v1 (predecessor to OWLv2). Same OWLv2Engine with OwlViTForObjectDetection.
OWL-ViT v1 large variant. Heavy model; GPU required.
Demo-fast model. Use rfdetr-small for accuracy-grade evaluation.
2XL RF-DETR-Seg variant; not yet wired. Requires 16+ GB VRAM. Expert use only.
Larger RF-DETR-Seg variant; not yet wired in this build. Use rfdetr-seg-nano/small/medium for verified inference.
XL RF-DETR-Seg variant; not yet wired. Requires 10+ GB VRAM. Use rfdetr-seg-nano/small for CPU-capable inference.
RT-DETRv4 large. Not yet wired.
RT-DETRv4 medium. Not yet wired.
RT-DETRv4 small. This label refers to the latest RT-DETR iteration. Requires custom loader. Not yet wired. Use dfine-s-o365-coco for verified RT-DETR-class inference.
RT-DETRv4 XL. Not yet wired. Requires 24 GB VRAM.
MedSAM fine-tuned on medical images. Loads via SamModel (standard HF SAM). Requires box or point prompt. Research and education only — no diagnostic claims.
SAM v1 (ViT-Base). Point/box prompts supported. For SAM 2, see sam2-hiera-* (requires separate install).
Highest quality SAM2.1 variant. GPU required.
SAM 2.1 improves on SAM 2 with better object permanence in video; HF ID confirmed: facebook/sam2.1-hiera-tiny
Do not auto-pull. Verify access via HF login before enabling.
SigLIP v1 base. Sigmoid-based contrastive learning.
SigLIP2 base. Supports text encoder for text-image matching.
SigLIP2 large. Higher capacity than base.
SigLIP2 400M architecture. Highest quality but very heavy.
